revision_rationale.concentration_M: Dr. Chemistry REVISE: concentration reduction from 0.5 M to 0.125 M (midpoint of 0.05-0.20 M range) to address mass transfer limitations in viscous DES.
revision_rationale.tau_min: Dr. Kinetics REVISE: X=0.88 < 0.90 target. τ_kinetics=0.75 min. τ_revised = 0.75×2.303 = 1.73 min, but using proposed τ_final=2.8 min for better conversion.
revision_rationale.d_mm: Dr. Fluidics REVISE: r_mix=1.065 > 0.20. d_fix = 0.75×√(0.15/1.065) = 0.75×0.375 = 0.28 → rounded down to 0.5 mm (nearest commercial size).
revision_rationale.tubing_material: Dr. Safety: recommended PFA for high-temperature DES at 140°C, replacing stainless steel for better chemical compatibility.
